description: User can conduct a conversation with the chatbot where he will provide the bot with his skills and then will receive a suitable job based on his provided skills
The input will first undergoes all the pre-processing techniques mentioned starting from removing unimportant characters, lowercasing, removing stopwords, lemmatization
Users will share their skills and interests with the bot, and the system will intelligently analyze and extract pertinent details from the user’s responses
User should be able to conduct a conversation with the chatbot
Users should be able to use mobile phones
Users should be able to converse in English with the chatbot
Admin should have access to a monitoring system that displays user-chatbot interactions in real-time
Admin should be able to view and manage user accounts, including user registration information
The system should ask follow-up questions to gain more information about users’ skills
Job recommender model will match the user skills with a specific job
User can give feedback after the job recommender model provides him with a suitable job
User will conduct a conversation with the chatbot in which he will provide his skills manually and then his skills will be extracted
The system should allow users to enter their skills into the chat interface
User should be able to register using email and password
Admin should be able to view user profiles
Admin should be able to view and analyze user feedback received after the AI suggests suitable jobs
